## Description
A brief description of what this PR does, the design rationale, and the context of the change.

## Related Issues
Fixes #[issue-number] (or links to relevant issues).

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality, ex. new suboperator)
- [ ] Refactoring / Performance optimization (e.g. low-resource code optimization)
- [ ] Documentation / Plan roadmap update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [**CONTRIBUTING.md**](file:///D:/GitHub/colony_of_minds_phases/CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the code style (PEP 8) of this project.
- [ ] My code is type-annotated and passes type checking (e.g., Pyright).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally.
- [ ] I have run the benchmarks (`python colony_ai/tests/run_benchmarks.py`) and verified no performance regression (RAM/latency).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / plans where applicable.
